description.p: Breeze is a peer-to-peer encrypted messenger that runs in your browser or as a native app. No phone number. No registration. No server stores your messages.

Messages travel directly between devices via WebRTC with ECDH P-256 key exchange and AES-256-GCM encryption. When a peer is offline, encrypted messages are temporarily relayed via server and deleted upon delivery.
Also includes Dead Drop (self-destructing secret sharing) and ephemeral encrypted chat rooms.
Initial release. P2P messenger + Dead Drop + encrypted chat.
